work_unit: MONI-PY-002 backtest frames DoS guard (derived from audit-2026-07-07-029)
situation: audit-2026-07-07-029 found M-severity unbounded List[BacktestFramePayload] in /backtest/run payload model (api.py:127). Attacker can POST millions of frames to exhaust server memory. Pydantic accepts Field(max_length=N) on List fields to reject oversized payloads at parse time with 422.
action: Added Field(max_length=5000) constraint to BacktestPayload.frames in worktree opt-local_simulator-1783352870 (reused from MONI-PY-001 SSRF fix). 5000 frames ≈ 20 years daily bars — ample for legitimate use, blocks DoS. cp-guard tripped because worktree already diverged from main HEAD (prior merged commits); used case-104 escape hatch: edited worktree directly + git commit inside wt. Pushed auto/opt-local_simulator-1783352870 to origin (d4fc660).
outcome_evidence: commit d4fc660 on auto/opt-local_simulator-1783352870; push 'Everything up-to-date' confirms origin has it; git log shows 3 sequential MONI-PY fixes (005→001→002) on same branch.
next_suggestion: 派生 MONI-PY-003 (M, sync WFO blocking async loop) → 同 worktree 复用或新 area
派生 MONI-PY-004 (M, agent action whitelist bypass kwargs injection)
待 3 pending route-fixes 全部 merged/rejected 后 cycle-complete → 触发下一轮全量审计

audit_findings.finding: Unbounded List[BacktestFramePayload] allows memory-exhaustion DoS via /backtest/run
